title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that while the US leads in chips, models, and applications, China has structural advantages in power generation and transmission for AI data centers. The difference stems from centralized governance in China versus fragmented jurisdictions in the US, affecting grid infrastructure and hyperscaler deployment options.
